answer:
Plain offers an official MCP server that allows AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor to interact directly with your support data [1]. You can connect by pointing your MCP client to the URL https://mcp.plain.com/mcp, which authenticates via your existing Plain account using OAuth, requiring no manual API keys [1].

For developers building their own Plain-based MCP servers, the plain.mcp package allows you to expose your app via an MCPView subclass mounted in your URLs [2][3]. Tools and resources are defined as subclasses that automatically derive metadata and handle context [2][4].

results.title: Build an MCP server - Model Context Protocol
